chunks.title: Actionable Steps to Reduce Glyphosate Exposure
chunks.summary: The speaker discusses various strategies to decrease glyphosate exposure, including getting glyphosate levels tested and opting for grass-fed meat from trusted sources. They emphasize the importance of avoiding certain foods, especially grains and beans, and highlight the role of water quality in reducing glyphosate intake.
